description.en: Control Kodi with Remote 3. Optionally use MPC-HC as external player for accurate position and playback state.
description.de: Steuere Kodi mit Remote 3. Optional MPC-HC als externen Player für exakte Position und Wiedergabestatus.

value.en: The integration will let you configure your Kodi instances on your network.
value.fr: Cette intégration permet de configurer vos instances Kodi dans le réseau.
